history.title: Company history
history.description: In September 2020, pursuant to the decision of the Board of the LLC “IMKON FINANS Microcredit Organization,” the company was transformed into a Joint-Stock Company “IMKON FINANS Microcredit Organization.”

supervisory_board.title: Supervisory Board
info_management: Exercises general management of the activities of the Joint-Stock Company 'IMKON FINANS Microcredit Organization'.
Acts as the governing body of the Company.
Accountable to the general meeting of shareholders on matters regarding the management of the Company.

management_body.title: Management Body
info_management: Defines the status of the Company's Management Body — the director's status, scope of authority, procedure for organizing activities, director's work, election (appointment), as well as rights and obligations.
The Director manages the day-to-day operations of the company and acts as the sole executive body of the company.
The Director is accountable to the supervisory board and the general meeting of shareholders.
